name: |-Dark Bowser) (Mario And Luigi Bowser’s Inside Story)
description:
It’s Dark Bowser! It was originally the dark star before it took some of Bowser’s DNA and copied it, turning him into a more cruel, more dangerous creature. Be sure to be careful around it, as even the most powerful of heroes AND villains fear this being.

(I found no good pictures of this guy and I’m sure nobody wants to see those modded in pictures of him using a render of normal Bowser.)

For Blackfire the Dragamon. (And everyone else I guess)
creator: IGottaSwitchNamesMan
